_provenance.note: P-256 ECDSA signatures are NOT byte-identical across runtimes when the upstream impl uses random-k (nodecrypto.ts, webcrypto.ts). This C# port mirrors upstream's purejs runtime which uses RFC 6979 deterministic-k, so the signature bytes are reproducible. Either way, all signatures verify under the same public key + SHA-256(content).

stampShape.stamp_test_assertion: Decode base64url -> JSON.parse; keys equal ['publicKey', 'scheme', 'signature']; publicKey == fixture.publicKey; scheme == SIGNATURE_SCHEME_TK_API_P256; signature verifies as DER ECDSA against SHA-256(message) under the fixture public key.
